metadata.description: Agentic design workflow marketplace — plugins that package the April → Shredder → Karai → {Bebop | Baxter | Chaplin | Metalhead | Splinter | Tatsu | Krang} → Bishop → Tiger Claw pipeline with Traag-style scope enforcement.

plugins.name: mutagen
plugins.description: End-to-end agentic design workflow: April interviews the user and authors the five upstream documents (PRD / ADR / DDD / ISC / DSD), Shredder slices the approved bundle, Karai dispatches executors through Bishop review and Tiger Claw adversarial QA, and a PreToolUse hook enforces per-slice filesystem scope.
